hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '/actuator/(shutdown|refresh)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 파괴적 actuator endpoint 접근 금지' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(for|while|until)\s.*curl|seq.*curl|xargs.*curl|parallel.*curl|watch.*curl|curl.*\[.*-.*\]|\b(ab|wrk|hey|siege|vegeta|bombardier|k6|locust)\b'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 반복 요청(rate-limit 테스트) 금지' >&2; exit 2; fi
